nameEn: Wakala of Qaytbay near Bab al-Nasr
whyCandidateMatters: Wakala of Qaytbay near Bab al-Nasr would broaden the project beyond the current 41-record set and improve district, type, or period coverage. Coverage value: this record would expand the Burji Mamluk layer in Gamaliyya through a wakala rather than duplicating an existing published monument.
knownResearchGaps: Confirm a direct monument-specific institutional or academic source.
